chain_edges.notes: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 GGUF SSTI is one of the four Apr 19-26 inference-runtime CVEs the focal prediction names as composing the AI-Infra category.

An AI-Infra CVE class with NVD tagging would land CVSS 8.0+ LLM-integration entries on Patch Tuesday rollups, the recurring pattern downstream forecasts.

relations.notes: GGUF supply-chain hardening is a narrower instance of the focal's inference-server template/loader RCE category; the focal subsumes it.
CI-agent secret exfiltration and inference-server CVE class share the agentic-CI surface but target distinct CWE buckets and standards bodies.
